title: Inspector General Doctrine
purpose: Establish an independent Office of the Inspector General (OIG) to provide oversight, audits, investigations, and anti-corruption safeguards within PulseWorld.

independence.removalProcess: Requires supermajority vote of both Senate and Judiciary

principles: Integrity: safeguard against fraud, abuse, and corruption
Transparency: publish findings and reports to the public ledger
Accountability: enforce compliance with governance standards
Independence: free from political or institutional interference
Protection: ensure whistleblower confidentiality and safety

powersAndDuties.audits: Conduct regular audits of financial, operational, and governance systems at least once per year
powersAndDuties.investigations: Investigate credible allegations of misconduct, fraud, or abuse
powersAndDuties.reports: Issue public reports and recommendations for corrective action
powersAndDuties.referrals: Refer serious violations to the Judiciary for enforcement
powersAndDuties.complianceMonitoring: Ensure adherence to transparency and accountability standards

process.auditCycle: Annual minimum, with additional audits as needed

enforcement.constitutionalViolation: Confirmed corruption, fraud, or abuse is treated as a constitutional violation
